company: Shanghai United Imaging Intelligence Co., Ltd.
intended_use: uAI Portal is a software solution intended to be used for viewing, manipulation, communication, and storage of medical images. It supports interpretation and evaluation of examinations within healthca
intended_use_full: uAI Portal is a software solution intended to be used for viewing, manipulation, communication, and storage of medical images. It supports interpretation and evaluation of examinations within healthcare institutions. It has the following additional indications: The Lower Extremity Vessel Analysis is intended to provide a tool for viewing, manipulating, and evaluating CTA images of lower extremities. The Head and Neck Vessel Analysis is intended to provide a tool for viewing, manipulating, and evaluating imaging datasets acquired with head and neck CTA. The Coronary Analysis is intended to provide a tool for viewing, manipulating, and evaluating imaging datasets acquired with CCTA. The Pulmonary Artery Analysis is intended to provide a tool for viewing, manipulating, and evaluating imaging datasets acquired with CTPA. The Aorta Analysis is intended to provide a tool for viewing, manipulating, and evaluating imaging datasets acquired with aorta CTA.
target_condition: Vascular and cardiac pathology including coronary artery disease, aortic disease, pulmonary embolism, and lower extremity arterial disease
ground_truth: Manual annotation by two independent Chinese radiologists with at least 5 years clinical experience, with adjudication by an American Board-Certified Radiologist with at least 10 years clinical experience to establish final ground truth segmentation masks
other_metrics: Dice coefficient: Coronary Artery Vessels segmentation 0.920, Heart segmentation 0.980, Head vessel segmentation 0.902, Neck vessel segmentation 0.967, Aorta Trunk segmentation 0.946, Aorta Branches segmentation 0.846, Pulmonary Artery Arteries segmentation 0.953, Pulmonary Artery Veins segmentation 0.933, Lower Extremity Arteries segmentation 0.892
